title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes in Lebanon, as Iran Talks Remain on Hold
summary_full: Cease-fires in Lebanon and Iran are on shaky ground, with military attacks flaring and direct talks between Washington and Tehran to end their war stalled.
summary_public: Cease-fires in Lebanon and Iran are on shaky ground, with military attacks flaring and direct talks between Washington and Tehran to end their war stalled.
